summary: Jeff Atwood briefly recommends Chris Sells as a developer worth following, highlighting his rare combination of technical skill and communication ability. The post serves as a simple endorsement directing readers to Sells' archived blog posts and current content. Atwood expresses his wish that more developers possessed this dual talent for coding and writing. The post is essentially a link recommendation with minimal original content.
key_points: Chris Sells possesses the rare combination of strong coding skills and strong communication skills
Atwood considers everything Sells writes to be worth reading
The post recommends both archived and current content from Sells' blog
Atwood wishes more developers could both code and communicate well
money_quotes: Chris Sells is one of those rare developers who is so talented at both coding and communicating that everything he writes is worth reading.
How I wish this was more common!
key_insight: The ability to both code well and communicate well is a rare and valuable combination in software development.
